title: PresntAI
domain: Audio AI | Speech Processing | Enterprise Meeting Automation
description: On-premises, end-to-end meeting intelligence platform converting raw recordings into speaker-attributed, context-aware documentation. Handles transcription, diarization, speaker identification, and AI-driven analysis.
overview: PresntAI is an on-premises, end-to-end meeting intelligence platform that converts raw meeting recordings into speaker-attributed, context-aware documentation automatically. It handles the full pipeline: audio standardization, transcription, speaker diarization, speaker identification, transcript alignment, and AI-driven meeting analysis. The system generates Minutes of Meeting (MoM), speaker-wise action points, executive summaries, and maintains an understanding of previous meetings for continuity. Entirely hosted on internal infrastructure, ensuring enterprise privacy.

features.label: On-Premises & Privacy-Preserving
features.description: All processing, storage, and distribution run inside the corporate network. No external SaaS.

features.label: Complete Audio-to-Documentation Pipeline
features.description: From raw audio (up to 5 GB) to polished PDF reports: transcript, diarization, MoM, decisions, commitments.

features.label: Speaker Diarization and Real-Name Identification
features.description: pyannote diarization + SpeechBrain ECAPA embeddings with enrolled speaker database.

features.label: Speaker-Wise Action Points & Contextual Memory
features.description: AI extracts decisions and action items by speaker, leveraging previous meeting context.

features.label: Automatic MoM Generation & Email Distribution
features.description: Professional MoM automatically generated and emailed to all participants.

features.label: In-UI Recording
features.description: Built-in recording eliminates dependency on external tools.

algorithms.name: ASR (Speech-to-Text)
algorithms.description: faster-whisper with VAD filter, beam size 10.

algorithms.name: Speaker Diarization
algorithms.description: pyannote pipeline generating labeled speaker segments and RTTM.

algorithms.name: Speaker Attribution
algorithms.description: Transcript chunks mapped to diarization segments by timestamp overlap.

algorithms.name: Speaker Recognition
algorithms.description: ECAPA embedding → cosine similarity against enrolled DB → threshold-based Unknown fallback.

algorithms.name: Multi-LLM Intelligence
algorithms.description: Noise cleanup (Vicuna), Outcomes (DeepSeek R1), Summary (Llama3), Speaker Analysis (DeepSeek R1).

modules.name: API Server
modules.responsibility: Upload, analysis, status, results, report serving, health endpoints

modules.name: Orchestration Engine
modules.responsibility: Full pipeline: transcription → diarization → alignment → LLM analysis

modules.name: Diarization Module
modules.responsibility: pyannote diarization, RTTM + readable log output

modules.name: Speaker Recognizer
modules.responsibility: Enrolled speaker DB, ECAPA inference, cosine similarity matching

modules.name: Meeting Analysis Pipeline
modules.responsibility: Ollama prompt execution, markdown sanitization, PDF generation

results: Full on-premises meeting intelligence platform operational at IIFL Samasta
Speaker-attributed transcripts with real name mapping
Automatic speaker-wise action points and contextual memory across meetings
Zero manual documentation and zero manual distribution
Windows-stable deployment using faster-whisper + pyannote + Ollama
